offer: For medical clinics processing 20–50 invoices/month, billing code discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile billing codes against reimbursements instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Discrepancies between medical billing codes and insurance reimbursements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to clinics with demo video
Community forums for sharing medical tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of billing codes for discrepancies
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
